V0.0.1.description:
Initial Testing Release of Final Fantasy 7's Archipelago integration.

This can only be used in conjunction the the Gold Saucer Randomizer available from: https://github.com/blazerwazey/Gold-Saucer/releases
V0.0.1.title: v0.0.1 FF7 AP World

V0.0.2.description:
Define _GOLD_CHOCOBO_EARLY_REGIONS set (Kalm, Mythril Mines, Chocobo Farm, Fort Condor, Junon, Corel, Gold Saucer Area, Midgar Sector 5)
Add item_rule in _apply_free_roam_rules to block Gold Chocobo placement in early-reachable regions
Remove Gold Chocobo from early_priority_items list in create_regions (keep Green Chocobo, Submarine, Highwind)
V0.0.2.title: V0.0.2 FF7 APWorld

v0.0.3.description:
Patch Notes:

FF7: Free Roam game-over recovery - auto re-deliver all received items after a Game Over, fix key-item gate-flag conflicts, PHS menu lock, and armor init

Add automatic game-over detection and item re-delivery: latch module 26 (Game Over), debounce _RESUME_REDELIVER_TICKS stable gameplay ticks, then re-queue all received items to restore key items/vehicles/party/chocobos/inventory wiped by md1stin baseline reload

Add /resync command for manual re-delivery (same mechanism as auto recovery)
v0.0.3.title: V0.0.3 FF7 APWorld

v0.0.4.description:
**New**
- **AP shop descriptions show classification** — `An Archipelago Item for <Player> - <Progression/Useful/Filler/Trap> Item`.
- **`disable_fort_condor_checks`** YAML option (World group). This only effects the minigame checks.

**Locations**
- **Red Submarine** is a working check — ram detection uses the game's natural flag (`0x0EF6.0`); the materia hits your menu only when received via AP.
- **Cosmo Canyon Item Store** double pickup (Elixir + Magic Source) added.
- **Basement Key** re‑introduced as a check.
- **Glacier Map / Snowboard / Basement Key** locations no longer removed when received via AP.
- **Excluded:** Nibelheim Item Store – Elixir, North Corel – Catastrophe.

**Items / placement**
- **Weapon delivery fixes** — Heaven's Cloud no longer gives Apocalypse; 3 Morph‑phones corrected; 5 duplicate entries removed.
- **Huge Materia** delivered only via AP (in‑game pickups fire the check without adding to the menu).
- **early_priority_items** no longer forces Highwind/Submarine/Green Chocobo early.

**Client / live game**
- **Submarine** spawns *and* is drivable out to sea at Junon.
- **Icicle Inn snowboard cat** moved aside so the pickup is reachable.
- **Limit Breaks** work on AP‑delivered characters (no battle softlock).
- **Game‑over redundancy** — all AP items re‑delivered after a Free Roam game over + `/resync` command.
- **PHS menu** locked until 3 characters received.
- **XP / Gil / Materia(AP) multipliers** apply consistently (incl. after a process restart).
- Reverted the Yuffie forest encounter flag; removed the unused `Var[3][189]` write.
v0.0.4.title: V0.0.4 FF7 APWorld
